questionHtml: Calculate the standard enthalpy change for this reaction using the following data.
markschemeHtml:
ΔHθ = [–165.2 + 2(–296.9) + 2(–92.3)] – [–454.7 + 2(–245.7)]

«ΔHθ = +»2.5 «kJ»

 

Award [2] for correct final answer.

Award [1] for –2.5 «kJ».

Do not accept ECF for M2 if more than one error in M1.
